title: vernonia lasiopus var. iodocalyx
intro: Vernonia lasiopus var. iodocalyx is a lesser-known variety of the Vernonia lasiopus plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vernonia lasiopus var. iodocalyx are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as antiseptic and antifungal properties that may aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and may be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
